perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a plaid cap, glasses, and a black shirt walks along a sidewalk, looking toward the camera with an expressive face. (2) He enters a brightly lit retail store with glass display cases filled with electronics. (3) He presents a dark-colored iPhone 14 Pro to a male clerk behind a counter. (4) Close-up shots of the iPhone 14 Pro being handled and inspected. (5) Transition to the man sitting at a desk, looking at a display cabinet containing various used iPhones (iPhone 12 Pro, 12 mini) with price tags. (6) He points at specific phones in the cabinet while speaking directly to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop background music with a steady electronic beat begins. A male voice speaks in a high-pitched, enthusiastic, and fast-paced tone. (2) The music continues at a consistent volume as a second, calmer male voice (the clerk) provides technical details about phone battery health and trade-in prices. (3) The first male voice returns, reacting with surprise and excitement. (4) The audio concludes with the upbeat music fading out slightly as the primary speaker gives a final recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '最划算的 iPhone?' (The most cost-effective iPhone?) in yellow/black variety style. (2) Decorative Text: '無敵划算!' (Incredibly cost-effective!) appearing with spark effects. (3) Functional Text: '舊機請他們估價!!' (Ask them to appraise the old phone!!) explaining the action. (4) Data Text: '最高可以回收 17000元' (Recyclable for up to 17,000) and 'iPhone 12 pro 只要 9900元耶' (iPhone 12 pro only 9900) showing prices. (5) Decorative Text: '原廠電池' (Original battery) emphasizing service quality.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro on street -> Trade-in appraisal in-store -> Showcase of second-hand inventory -> Outro summary

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim哥), 1 store employee behind the counter.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male wearing a distinctive black and white plaid flat cap, black glasses, a black short-sleeved button-down shirt over a white t-shirt, and a bright yellow wristwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Initially a gray tiled sidewalk with trees and city buildings; shifts to a retail interior with white shelves, glass display cabinets, and various smartphone boxes/accessories.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight outdoors followed by bright, even fluorescent studio-style lighting indoors.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional endorsement for 'miko' mobile shop. It aims to demonstrate the ease and high value of trading in old iPhones (specifically the 14 Pro) while highlighting the affordability and quality (including original battery replacement) of their second-hand inventory like the iPhone 12 series.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator visits a specific branded store (miko), talks directly to staff, and highlights their specific pricing and battery replacement services.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim哥's signature plaid cap and high-energy presentation style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'variety show' editing styles common in Taiwanese tech vlogs to maintain viewer engagement through fast cuts and large text overlays.
